title: Ensure CNP V1 endpoint is able to make a successful payment with processor token
Ensure CNP V1 endpoint is able to make a successful payment with token GUID
Ensure, CNP V1 endpoint is able  to make a sucessful payment with paypageID
Ensure, Token is not saved into tokenvalut DB when CNP V1 endpoint  runs with processor token ( Right now not saving in future it might be saved)
Ensure, CP V1 endpoint returns token GUID in the response
Ensure, CNP V1 endpoint is able to make a successful payment with token GUID which returns on CP response
Ensure, Token is able to save into tokenvalut DB when CP V1 endpoint runs
Ensure, Token is able to add successfully and able to save into token valut DB when tokenVaultAPI/add-token end point runs
Ensure, CNP V2 ( v2/cnp/charge) endpoint is able to make a successful payment with processor token
Ensure, CNP V2 ( v2/cnp/charge) endpoint is able to make a successful payment with token GUID'
Ensure, CNP V2 ( v2/cnp/charge) endpoint is able to make a successful payment with paypageid
Ensure, token is able to save into tokenvallt DB when CNP V2 end point runs with processor token ( If token is not present  in DB it will save . If token is already there it will not save)
Ensure that, CP charge card API retrieves Wellfit Token GUID as "cardToken" value response
